heroMetrics.label: Current stage
heroMetrics.copy: Final policy state after the simulated breach and recovery run.

heroMetrics.label: Treasury liquid value
heroMetrics.copy: Valued from the latest Pyth price and haircut-aware liquid value math.

heroMetrics.label: Stable protection
heroMetrics.copy: Current treasury share parked in the approved stable reserve.

heroMetrics.label: Oracle freshness
heroMetrics.copy: Age of the primary feed update relative to the latest policy evaluation.

dashboardCards.label: Protected floor
dashboardCards.copy: Minimum fiat-equivalent value the policy tries to keep defended at all times.

dashboardCards.label: Emergency floor
dashboardCards.copy: Crossing this floor escalates the vault into a full stable exit or freeze path.

dashboardCards.label: Primary reason
dashboardCards.value: Cooldown prevents an automatic state transition
dashboardCards.copy: Top reason emitted by the risk engine for the current snapshot set.

dashboardCards.label: Execution policy
dashboardCards.copy: Only allowlisted routes can spend from the execution hot wallet.

chainCards.title: Live execution surface
chainCards.copy: Cardano is the only live execution target in the MVP. Execution uses a two-step authorize-and-swap flow.

chainCards.title: Scaffolded adapter
chainCards.copy: Scaffolding only in the MVP. Designed to share the same policy and role model.

chainCards.title: Scaffolded adapter
chainCards.copy: Scaffolding only in the MVP. Connectors remain simulation-first until phase 2.

riskLadder.title: Operate with full permissions
riskLadder.copy: Fresh oracle, healthy confidence, and no forced action path active.

riskLadder.title: Increase monitoring
riskLadder.copy: The drawdown or fiat floor approaches the first trigger band.

riskLadder.title: Sell only what restores the safe floor
riskLadder.copy: The keeper sells a bounded slice of the risky bucket into the approved stable route.

riskLadder.title: Move the vault fully defensive
riskLadder.copy: A deeper breach exits the risk bucket and keeps the hot wallet on one stable rail.

riskLadder.title: Re-risk only after hysteresis clears
riskLadder.copy: Recovery must clear a separate band and cooldown before exposure comes back.

executionTimeline.title: Step 1 · Partial De-Risk
executionTimeline.copy: Intent 815ede7a-6cf0-49fe-939f-262dfa1b6a4c anchored and settled in tx tx-8eb5d881-9efe-4ae5-9cb8-11d7a5d06424.

executionTimeline.title: Step 2 · Full Stable Exit
executionTimeline.copy: Intent 27535a6c-6d30-4a06-9e8b-655c620913c8 anchored and settled in tx tx-b713b68d-6d8e-42d3-8ec6-f20e66c0a61f.

executionTimeline.title: Step 3 · Normal
executionTimeline.copy: Intent 8205bd55-2e1e-452d-b0ca-5c1889e371d4 anchored and settled in tx tx-41e2236d-9cd7-4f9b-958b-b9de83246025.

auditTrail.title: INTENT · intent:27535a6c-6d30-4a06-9e8b-655c620913c8
auditTrail.copy: Authorized derisk swap at stage full exit.

auditTrail.title: EXECUTION · execution:tx-b713b68d-6d8e-42d3-8ec6-f20e66c0a61f
auditTrail.copy: Settled full exit. Sold 5,466 and bought 2,106.

auditTrail.title: INTENT · intent:8205bd55-2e1e-452d-b0ca-5c1889e371d4
auditTrail.copy: Authorized reentry swap at stage normal.

demoFrames.title: Watchlist breach detected
demoFrames.copy: ADA slips under its EMA while Pyth freshness and confidence remain healthy enough to authorize a policy action.
demoFrames.reason: Primary asset drawdown crossed watch threshold

demoFrames.title: Partial de-risk executes
demoFrames.copy: The keeper emits an intent, swaps only the bounded amount needed, and restores the defended stable floor.
demoFrames.reason: Primary asset drawdown crossed watch threshold

demoFrames.title: Full stable exit after the second leg down
demoFrames.copy: A deeper price break and thinner asset cushion push the vault into a full defensive configuration on the approved stable route.
demoFrames.reason: Primary asset drawdown crossed watch threshold

demoFrames.title: Auto re-entry restores exposure
demoFrames.copy: Recovery clears the hysteresis band, cooldown expires, and the treasury re-enters risk according to the configured target ratio.
demoFrames.reason: Cooldown prevents an automatic state transition
